response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned generalist engineer with 15+ years of production software development, strong TypeScript/Node.js depth, and genuine recent involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and his AI-specific work is largely confined to his current position started in April 2025. Python does not appear anywhere in his skills or employment history despite being a primary required language. There is no evidence of vector database usage, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or named multi-agent frameworks. His software craftsmanship pedigree and MCP server contributions are meaningful signals, but the AI delivery experience required for a Staff FDE role is not yet demonstrated at sufficient depth or duration.
strengths: 15+ years of staff-level production engineering across distributed systems, cloud (AWS CDK), and data-intensive platforms
Active hands-on work with Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators and agentic workflow frameworks in current role
Consistent track record of mentorship, knowledge-sharing (workshops, talks), and engineering excellence across organizations
concerns: Python is entirely absent from listed skills, employment history, and projects despite being a primary required language
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or optimization techniques
AI/GenAI delivery experience is limited to roughly one month in the current role, far short of the 8-year minimum requirement
